evals.prompt: Write E2E tests for my ExC Shell SPA that has a data table page and a create form page
evals.expected_output: Playwright config and test file created. Tests use frameLocator for iframe navigation, Spectrum ARIA selectors for table (grid role) and form (textbox role), and include assertions.

assertions.description: Creates Playwright configuration file at project root.
Creates E2E test file in the e2e/ directory.
Uses Spectrum ARIA selectors for table and form components.

evals.prompt: Add Playwright E2E tests for my AEM Content Fragment Console extension that adds an export button
evals.expected_output: Test file with nested iframe handling for AEM extension, references Extension Tester or AEM surface, handles action bar button click and modal interaction.

assertions.description: Creates E2E test file in the e2e/ directory.
References Extension Tester URL or AEM surface.
Handles nested iframe navigation for AEM extensions.
Tests extension action bar button or export functionality.

evals.prompt: Set up E2E testing in my CI pipeline with Playwright
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions workflow file with Playwright browser installation, test execution, and artifact upload for reports and failure traces.

assertions.description: Uploads test artifacts (reports, traces) on failure.

evals.prompt: Test the full flow of my App Builder app: user fills a form, submits to a backend action, and sees results in a table
evals.expected_output: E2E test covering form fill, submit, and table verification. Uses Spectrum ARIA selectors for form fields and table, includes action response handling.

assertions.description: Creates E2E test file in the e2e/ directory.
Fills form fields using Spectrum textbox selectors.
Submits the form via button click.
Verifies results in a table/grid after submission.
